if you want to stick with Agrippa I think she's mostly used as a tanky support in poison comps, although normally with Xu who isn't available right now. Which is why I suggested Liz since she's a standard poison DPS that wouldn't need you to change realms, if you wanted to keep using this team. I'm not sure how well she works with Thais, duping Deadly Flames is probably good though, but maybe not as good since she generates a bunch of copies herself so more is less impactful

Thais does say she can't dupe derived command cards, and I'm not sure how that interacts with Liz, her Flames are one of her base command cards that transforms which is exactly what GHelot does and Thais can dupe her flails. I honestly have no idea how they interact
agrippa is actually mostly used in castor stall comps
usually castor erica agrippa X
xu fits in nicely but its almost a waste to put her there

I mean, I'm coming at this from 'they've got an Agrippa with her wheel and a bunch of copies, along with Thais and Arachne. What can be built around that with what's free or already on their account' rather than what endgame teams she goes in. I know I've seen people running Xu/Agrippa as a red Arachne poison comp. There's probably better endgame teams for both Xu and Arachne, but this is for their main story team
and since Xu isn't available, my thought was Liz. I'm definitely not an expert though, I'm still fairly new myself, although a bit ahead of where they are

content: yeah that’s what i was doing beforehand but arachne with 1 turn of setup does more dmg than 4x bloodthirsty flails
which is what i find feasible atm

well they work together, Arachne's Pursuit has high base Verdict damage, but it doesn't scale with other damage increases like Vulnerable, Strength, or Crit Damage. Arachne has a bunch of damage buffs that affect Flail, and her Exalt and Pursuit stack even more, and ideally you're playing more than 4 flails once you have the right Posse.
Where does Arachne do more than four flails? Have I missed something?

Chapter 7 Posse copies a card, and Thais copies one twice. Arachne doesn't really give you more flails (well, ultra round cards but I think they come out at 4 cost so at most you're only getting 1 from her), she just buffs their base damage a bunch
and you can use the Posse multiple times because the copies aren't fleeting

The generater card lands in your hand AND in the ultra bar, shortening the acces to ultra turn by 1 turn (you did put the normal first command in the bar AND a thousand mirage, so 2 ultra cards the same round)
your max hp is also very low, i did that stage with 800 max hp
